findings.note: All three ProtectedGatePluginJsonSuffixes entries are now exercised, but every fixture path carries a parent directory, so only the leading-slash EndsWith arm of Test-IsProtectedGateFile is hit; the TrimStart arm (a file_path exactly equal to a bare dot-dir suffix with no parent prefix) has no fixture. The bundle/report phrasing 'relative and absolute path forms across all three dot-dir entries' overstates: each entry is exercised in exactly one form (2 relative, 1 absolute). Every table entry is still covered, so this is non-blocking.
Stale field: the section still records 'Task Attempt Count: 1' while the report header and the appended 'Attempt 2' section record attempt 2 (Run ID epic136guards-t-001-run-02).
Copilot emit-mode parity covers a protected write deny, a cd+rm deny, and an allow, but no malformed-payload (fail-closed) copilot scenario; malformed payloads are exercised only in exit-emit mode.
All shell scenarios use tool_name 'bash'; the aliases 'shell'/'exec_command'/'exec' share the same membership list in every twin but have no direct fixture.
